n: Stowaway: The Old Man on the Shore

steps.t: The old man is injured gravely and it seems that there is no hope to close his wounds. His request is simple, stay and listen to his tale so that he i…
Falnavar paused, but it seems there is more he has to say. Ask him to continue.
Falnavar paused again. Perhaps you should see if there is more that he wishes to tell you.
